code:
import io
import string

type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn next(_ c: Color) -> Color
  match c
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn label(_ c: Color) -> String
  match c
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

let line = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut state = Color.Red
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  state = next(state)
  i = i + 1
end
print(label(state))
